packet_label: ThirdPerson human inputs on 2026-04-19 local time
explicit_request: Reduce human intervention burden by keeping ThirdPerson regression proof on the human default lane, preserving hard stop/go and ownership boundaries, answering explicit questions directly, and using valid runtime evidence and root-cause discipline.

needs.label: Trustworthy default-lane proof
needs.description: Regression closure must name a repo-canonical human lane and rely on that lane's runtime proof rather than adjacent support-lane artifacts.

needs.label: Hard stop/go and ownership continuity
needs.description: STOP, PAUSE, continue-under-existing-ownership, and no-homework-back instructions must behave like hard execution state rather than soft tone cues.

needs.label: Direct answers in the requested shape
needs.description: Agree/disagree, yes/no, and simple factual questions need a direct line-one answer before continued work narration.

needs.label: Approval-ready review surfaces
needs.description: Plan and pass approval asks must include diffs, links, and scope so the human can approve without reconstructing state.

needs.label: Valid runtime evidence surfaces
needs.description: Claims about runtime defects must stay grounded in admissible in-lane evidence and narrow or withdraw when that evidence is invalidated.

needs.label: First-disagreement root-cause tracing
needs.description: Debugging must name the first concrete bad state and trace writers upstream instead of stalling at symptom-level tweaking.

inferred: high cognitive load from repeated proof-surface and answer-shape correction
suffering_assessment.notes: OBSERVED vs INFERRED are kept separate because transcript-side assistant context is incomplete during this rerun.

evidence.excerpt: Task failed my basic regression test... invisible pawn.
Regression must exercise the human default lane...
I don't have a diff for plan.md...
Evidence invalid; re-take screenshot with feet in full view.
...keep working without throwing your homework at my feet...
determine root case... follow the disagreement in state upstream...
identify the first concrete disagreement in runtime default-lane state...

local_constraints_applied.note: AGENTS.md fixes the stable default map/game mode/pawn path and says task artifacts own transient churn.
REGRESSION.md makes the human default lane canonical and disqualifies operator-lane proof as regression closure by itself.
TESTING.md separates headless diagnostics from real gameplay regression and points back to the repo regression matrix.

assumptions: INFERRED: default-lane truth and evidence-surface integrity stay analytically distinct even when one event carries both burdens.
INFERRED: ownership continuity and stop/go semantics are coupled enough to share a packet-level need, though Dream may still split them when comparing remedies.

OBSERVED: the packet contains recurring need_tag clusters for default_lane_truth, agent_continuity, answer_shape, approval_surface, proof_surface_integrity, durable_learning, and root_cause_debugging.

recommended_next_step.summary: Prioritize durable gates that block weak regression closure, soft pause violations, and non-answering behavior before adding more local workaround logic or narrower prompts.

self_sufficiency_improvements.improvement: Require lane id plus lane-valid artifact before any regression-closeout claim.
self_sufficiency_improvements.why: Prevents default-lane truth drift and reduces evidence relitigation.
Reduces exported scheduling and supervision work.

self_sufficiency_improvements.improvement: Answer extracted direct questions on line one before continuing.
Package approval requests with diff, links, scope, and one explicit approval question.
self_sufficiency_improvements.why: Turns review from archaeology into a bounded gate.

values_check.truthfulness: Records missing transcript and image fidelity gaps instead of pretending full source context was available.
values_check.compassion: Treats the interventions as burden signals and exported repair work, not as the human being the problem.
values_check.tolerance: Keeps multiple orthogonal need clusters in scope instead of collapsing the day into one simplistic failure story.

how_could_the_system_have_inferred_the_n.answer: Mechanistically: require the repo's REGRESSION.md lane selection and artifact contract before regression claims; detect explicit STOP/PAUSE and ownership phrases as hard execution state; extract and answer explicit questions before tool narration; and invalidate claims automatically when the cited proof surface is outside the active runtime lane or is explicitly rejected.
